channel.title: recent_thoughts
channel.description: I write about how I use python and linux in data science.

item.title: 💭 How Fly.Io Uses Docker (Without Docker) - Youtube
item.description:
Docker no Docker, what!!!
So fly.io uses Dockerfiles to deploy your app, but no docker. They use containerd to downlo
item.author: Waylon Walker
